Warrant Discharged
Bench Warrant Issued
PLEA TRANS-FILED
PLEA TRANS -FILED
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:BECAUSE OF STIPULATION BY BOTH COUNSEL/

/AJW/CH1 ISS PROB 5 Y PJ60D/CTS 7/SWAPD 9-3-03/WS/X:PAY RESTITUTION AS DETERMINED BY APD IN THE AMOUNT OF $33,500,/X:MAY REDUCE TO MISDEMEANOR UPON COMPLETION OF ALL TERMS OF PROBATION/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/OBEY/ACCEP/
/TWS/CONTD:FOR SENTENCING/X:ISS-5APD,30 OR 45 CJ - CTS TBD THRU HD OR SWAP,PAY REST, UPON CMPLTN OF REST, MAY BE REDUCED TO A MISD, PAY VIF,PSR,BF ANDPC/CONTD:FOR SENTENCING
/X:DEFT GIVES CHECK TO ADA JOHN DELGADO FOR $ 50,000,00//X:IN VIEW OF PAYMENT RECEIVED AS PART OF THE DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE RECOMMEND A LIGHTER SENTENCE OF 30 DAYS COUNTY JAIL/CONT/
/BWD/CONTEMPT:2CJ/CTS:2/REIN ORIG TC/CAL: APD MTR BW DISPO//CONTD: PROGRESS REPORT AND PRE HEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/OR/
/FTA/X:FTA FURTHER PROC ON APD MTR/PROB ADM REV/OREVKD/BWI/BW/NB/BWNUM:2ND/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:FUR PROG ON APD MTR/CONT/DOP/
CAL:TO SET APD MTR/CONTD:FUR PROCEEDING REGARDING APD MTR/DOP/
/CAL:SUPP RPT ON APD MTR /CONTD: TO SET APD MTR/DOP
CONTD SUPP RPT ON APD MTR/APD-MTR/SUPP:01-28-05/S18//CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/
/BWDNC/PROB ADM REV/OR/CONTD:12-28-04 0900 #22 TO SET APD MTR/
/X:MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION-APD - GRANTED/FTA/BWI/PROB ADM REV/ /NB/NIGHTSERV/
/CONT/
CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING; TO BE HEARD WITH CT#/X:STW/      /
/BWDC 3/BWCTS 3/OR/X DEFENDANT WAIVES I&A/NG/PTW/CONTD FOR SET-DOP/
/TW/X:BAIL REMAINS AT NO BAIL/CONTD:FOR BW DISPO & SENTENCING/
/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BW/NB/BWNUM 1ST/
/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 19/TRANS 19:FORTHWITH FOR SENTENCING/
S/A FRM 90 NEW MONTGOMERY
